name: Creamy Blender Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chocolate into small pieces.
2. Add all ingredients to a blender.
3. Cover and blend at low speed until larger pieces are chopped.
4. Turn off the motor and stir manually.
5. Blend at high speed until the frosting becomes thick and creamy.
6. This frosting is absolutely delicious and makes 3 cups.
